portfolio_rationale: GOOGL is the highest-conviction pick with bullish signals across both fundamentals and technicals, minimal leverage, and a weak bear case. AMZN earns a meaningful allocation on strong fundamental momentum and bullish news trends despite mixed technicals. BRK.B receives a small allocation given its bullish judge verdict but is discounted due to stale fundamental data and a fully bearish technical picture. AAPL, LLY, and XOM are excluded as judge decisions are bearish.

GOOGL.reason: Only ticker with bullish technical analyst signal plus strong fundamentals, low leverage, and a clearly weak bear case making it the highest-conviction long.

AMZN.reason: Strong revenue growth, high margins, bullish news trends, and positive EMA crossover support the bull case despite short-term price weakness below 20-day SMA.

BRK.B.reason: Bullish judge verdict on solid financials and cash flows, but discounted due to stale fundamental data (May 2025) and a fully bearish technical picture with no bullish technical factors.

AAPL.reason: Judge signal is bearish with 0.85 confidence; multiple bearish technical indicators and liquidity concerns outweigh strong fundamentals.

LLY.reason: Judge signal is bearish; negative FCF, elevated leverage, bearish technicals, and majority-negative news flow all weigh against a long position.

XOM.reason: Judge signal is bearish with 0.85 confidence; negative technical momentum across all indicators and quick liquidity risk exclude it from the portfolio.
